title: Dynamic Trees - Soils Compat - Immersive Weathering/Grounded
description: Allows Dynamic Trees to grow on Immersive Weathering/Grounded/Unearthed soils and more
body:
This mod packages a tree pack for Dynamic Trees that allows the seeds to grow on Immersive Weathering or Grounded soils, specifically, Rooted Grass, Loam, Sandy Dirt, Permafrost, Earthen Clay, Silt and the Grassy variants of the blocks that have them.

This mod makes no other changes to existing blocks or functions and since it is essentially a packaged tree pack, it should have no conflicts or issues beyond what is normally a problem with Immersive Weathering/Grounded or Dynamic Trees, and any issues should be taken up with one of those two mods.
